description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular gas station pump with a dark, boxy structure and a flat, deep red canopy on top. The front face features a display panel with visible text indicating fuel price and volume, as well as two protruding elements that resemble fuel nozzles or handles. The sides are plain and solid, with no visible openings or additional features. The back is similarly minimalistic, lacking any display or interactive components. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function over decorative elements, and the materials appear to be primarily metal with a glossy finish on the canopy.
description: A compact, rectangular gas station pump with a dark body, deep red canopy, and a front display panel with fuel information and nozzles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display panel with fuel price and volume, two nozzle-like protrusions, and the deep red canopy.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, flat profile of the pump and the overhanging canopy, with no visible interactive features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back beneath the canopy, lacking any display or nozzles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a flat, solid surface and no visible components.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Two fuel nozzles are visible on the front panel, arranged vertically and integrated into the main body. The style is modern, with a dark color scheme and no visible branding or digital displays on the nozzles themselves.
attribute_canopy_structure: A flat, rectangular canopy in deep red covers the top of the pump, supported by the main body with no separate columns. The canopy is simple and lacks visible lighting or signage.
attribute_station_signage: No station signage is visible on the object.
attribute_price_display_board: A price display is integrated into the front panel, showing fuel price and volume in a digital or printed format. The display is dark with light text, and two price listings are visible.
